MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Sep-05-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jimmy Quan, 595-8202, defendant and moving party appearing in propria persona
Elizabeth A. MacDonald, 922-5939, for plaintiff and responding party (was not present when case was recalled)

Ms. MacDonald was not present when the case was recalled. No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT JIMMY QUAN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES IS DENIED. Order signed in open Court. (301/DEW/ck) JUDGE: DIANE WICK, REPORTER: CANDACE YOUNT, CSR# 2737
